details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectory is missing.
reports/board/ directory is missing; governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to both exist. reports/audit/ is present.

Deprecated moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python modules: board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py. This directory should have been removed per Clawdbot/Moltbot deprecation.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs that document removal): moltbot/board.py, moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, alpaca_codebase_payload.txt. The moltbot/ directory contains a full deprecated module tree.
